summary: JG12 Iteration 16 - All 4 nutrition calculator improvements verified. Backend: 3110 foods count, search with macros_efectivos, frequency ordering for users with diets, alphabetical for users without. Frontend: BuildMealModal shows protein categories in Paso 1, auto-advances to Paso 2 at 80% P, Paso 3 at 80% H, blocked foods show 'Macro cubierto' + 'Bloqueado' text with opacity-40.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/foods/count returns 3110
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=pollo returns foods with macros
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=arroz returns carb foods (H>0)
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=whey returns protein powders (P>0)
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=&category=2.2 for clientedemo returns foods (frequency ordering)
✅ Backend: GET /api/calculator/search?q=&category=2.2 for cliente@test.com returns alphabetical order
✅ Backend: Search with category filter returns correct category foods
✅ Backend: Search response has required fields (alimentos, total, id, nombre, proteinas, hidratos, grasas)
✅ Frontend: NutritionPage loads with 4 meal cards (C1-C4) for rest day
✅ Frontend: Day type shows 'Día de descanso' (auto-detected from routine)
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal opens when clicking 'Lo hago yo' on C1
✅ Frontend: BuildMealModal Paso 1 shows all 10 protein categories (Huevos, Claras, Aves, Vacuno, Cerdo, Pescados, Lácteos, Proteína, Legumbres, Vegetal)
✅ Frontend: Category click (Aves) loads 100 foods from that category
✅ Frontend: Foods show protein values (P=21g, P=20g, etc.)
✅ Frontend: Adding food updates macros display
✅ Frontend: Auto-advance to Paso 2 (Acompañamiento) when P reaches 80% (41/47.5g = 86%)
✅ Frontend: Toast notification '✅ Proteínas cubiertas. Elige el acompañamiento.'
✅ Frontend: Paso 2 shows SIDE_CATEGORIES (Arroces, Panes, Cereales, Pasta, Tubérculos, Fruta, Verduras, Legumbres, Lácteos, Bebidas, Comida prep., Dulces, Salsas, Grasas, Sopas)
✅ Frontend: Auto-advance to Paso 3 (Últimos toques) when H reaches 80% (78/51g = 153%)
✅ Frontend: Toast notification '✨ ¡Macros cubiertos! Últimos toques.'
✅ Frontend: Paso 3 shows user preference categories or all categories
✅ Frontend: Blocked foods show 'Macro cubierto' text in red
✅ Frontend: Blocked foods show 'Bloqueado' text
✅ Frontend: Blocked foods have opacity-40 class (grayed out)
✅ Frontend: Blocked foods are disabled (not clickable)
✅ Frontend: Blocking logic correct - H-dominant foods blocked when H covered, P-dominant foods NOT blocked when P not covered
critical_code_review_comments: BuildMealModal.jsx: getBlockReason() correctly checks if served >= target + 4g margin before blocking
BuildMealModal.jsx: getFoodBlockReason() correctly calculates macros at ración and checks dominant macro
BuildMealModal.jsx: Auto-advance useEffect correctly triggers at 80% P (Paso 1→2) and 80% H (Paso 2→3)
calculator.py: _get_food_frequency() correctly counts food usage from saved diets
calculator.py: search endpoint correctly sorts by frequency for users with diets, alphabetical for users without
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration16.py - Created comprehensive test suite for new features
seed_data_creation: Used existing saved diets for clientedemo (2026-04-12 and 2026-04-15 with pollo and arroz)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 verified all 4 nutrition calculator improvements: 1) 3110 foods loaded in search, 2) Search results ordered by frequency for users with diets (clientedemo), alphabetical for users without (cliente@test.com), 3) Blocked foods show disabled+opacity-40+'Bloqueado' when macro covered (served >= target + 4g), 4) Guided flow works: Paso 1 (protein categories) → Paso 2 (side categories at 80% P) → Paso 3 (user preferences at 80% H). Key data-testids: meal-card-C1, build-meal-C1, food-item-{id}, save-build-meal. Today is Wednesday April 22, 2026 (rest day for clientedemo).
